non_blocking_notes: `./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. `npm run test` and `npm run build` could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vitest/Astro attempted writes to `node_modules/.vite-temp` and `.astro/content.d.ts`.
No secrets were found in the changed source. Added member-facing strings in the source diff did not contain em dashes.
The checked-in `.codex/audits/optin-toggles.review.json` currently contains an older DO-NOT-SHIP review; the orchestrator should overwrite it with this verdict before merge.

spec_compliance.criterion: 1. Schema adds directory_visible, pipeline_state, and pipelineEligibilityReviews indexes
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/schema.ts:92-102` adds the member toggle fields; `convex/schema.ts:182-196` adds `pipelineEligibilityReviews` with `by_member` and `by_state`.

spec_compliance.criterion: 2. setDirectoryVisible is auth-keyed, locks off minor/restricted_unknown, and audits
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/members.ts:888-963` resolves the member from auth, only permits enabling for active `standard`/`ally` lanes, audits lane refusals and successful writes.

spec_compliance.criterion: 3. setPipelineOptIn enforces active standard-lane attested ON and always-available OFF revocation
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/members.ts:974-1059` enforces active lifecycle, `canUsePipeline`, attestation, consent row, pending review, state update, pending-review withdrawal, and audit. Join/claim activation review creation is handled in `convex/lib/pipeline.ts:13-49`, `convex/auth.ts`, and `convex/members.ts:866-877`; `writeConsent` refuses pipeline writes at `convex/members.ts:533-547`.

spec_compliance.criterion: 4. decidePipelineReview fallback approves/rejects pending reviews and audits reviewer
spec_compliance.evidence: `convex/pipelineReviews.ts:11-50` is an internal mutation for the CLI/admin fallback, idempotently ignores non-pending reviews, sets member `pipeline_state`, and writes an admin-fallback audit row with reviewer.

spec_compliance.criterion: 5. Settings UI exposes the specified choices and locks minors out of controls
spec_compliance.evidence: `src/portal/Dashboard.tsx:144-152` opens the panel; `src/portal/Settings.tsx:26-34` shows the under-18/unknown locked line with no controls; `src/portal/Settings.tsx:54-165` renders the exact toggle labels/tips, attestation step, pending copy, rejected support route, and OFF control.

`convex/members.ts:221-230` strips mentor options server-side for non-toggle lanes; `src/portal/Dashboard.tsx:25-28,136-139` passes the minor/unknown flag to the editor, and `src/portal/ProfileEditor.tsx:386-403` hides mentor options.
No partner-facing query or route was added. The only partner-search logic in the diff is the pure future-rule helper in `convex/lib/toggles.ts:35-46`.

spec_compliance.criterion: 8. Tests cover the new pure rules and toggle safeguards
spec_compliance.evidence: Pure rule coverage is in `tests/unit/toggles.test.ts`; Convex safeguard coverage is in `tests/convex/toggleSafeguards.test.ts`, with join/claim invariant additions in `tests/convex/joinSafeguards.test.ts` and `tests/convex/claimSafeguards.test.ts`. Runtime execution was blocked by read-only filesystem, not by a test assertion failure.
The diff is scoped to schema, consent/review state, settings UI, SAFE-1 stripping, and tests. No directory browser, partner search, admin UI, or brokered-introduction surface was added.

summary: No ship-blocking authorization, minor-safeguarding, consent, audit, secret, data-exposure, or spec-delivery issue found in the diff. Ship, with build/test execution left to a writable environment.
